name: Metriport
description: Open-source universal API for healthcare data, aggregating patient medical records via HIEs like CommonWell and Carequality for 300M+ US individuals.

seo.title: Metriport — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Metriport: Open-source universal API for healthcare data, aggregating patient medical records via HIEs like CommonWell and Carequality for 300M+ US individuals.

when_to_use: Aggregating patient medical records from HIEs like CommonWell
Universal healthcare API abstracting multiple data networks
Building clinical decision tools with multi-source patient data
Open-source alternative to Health Gorilla for HIE connectivity
Populating patient records from nationwide clinical data exchange

pros: OSS approach unusual in US healthcare APIs
HIE network access via CommonWell and Carequality
Covers 300M+ US patient records at scale
cons: FHIR plumbing complexity inherent to domain
review.verdict: Refreshing OSS option in US healthcare integration; 1upHealth still has deeper enterprise scaffolding.
review.best_for: US healthtech startups wanting OSS FHIR integration with HIE coverage
review.not_for: Non-US teams or enterprises needing turnkey managed payer/provider platforms

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier, no explicit peak-lock evidence
